title: Under His Wings

T: Under His Wings

C: Words: William Orcutt Cushing, 1896.
C: Music and Setting: 'Under His Wings' Ira David Sankey, 1898. 
C: copyright: public domain.  This score is a part of the Open Hymnal Project, 2011 Revision.
S: Music source: "Church Hymns and Gospel Songs, 1898 Hymn 265.  Ed. Ira D. Sankey.
